title.en: Research on the Evolution of MySQL Java Client Dependency Coordinates: From mysql:mysql-connector-java to com.mysql:mysql-connector-j
title.zh: MySQL Java 客户端依赖坐标演进研究：从 mysql:mysql-connector-java 到 com.mysql:mysql-connector-j

summary.en: A systematic study of the MySQL Connector/J Maven coordinate change from mysql:mysql-connector-java to com.mysql:mysql-connector-j, covering version boundaries, relocation, Spring Boot dependency management, server compatibility, transitive dependencies, and engineering migration practices.
summary.zh: 系统研究 MySQL Connector/J Maven 坐标从 mysql:mysql-connector-java 迁移到 com.mysql:mysql-connector-j 的过程，覆盖版本边界、relocation、Spring Boot 依赖管理、服务端兼容性、传递依赖与工程迁移实践。

readingDirection.en: Read this when upgrading MySQL Connector/J, migrating Maven or Gradle coordinates, upgrading Spring Boot dependency management, checking runtime classpaths, or evaluating MySQL Server and Connector/J compatibility.
readingDirection.zh: 适合在升级 MySQL Connector/J、迁移 Maven 或 Gradle 坐标、升级 Spring Boot 依赖管理、检查运行时 classpath，或评估 MySQL Server 与 Connector/J 兼容性时阅读。
